title: POST-H-017-A — Release reproducibility schema y policy
pass_criteria: ReleaseReproducibilityPack schema is registered and validates the contractual fixture.
ReleaseEnvironmentSnapshot schema is registered and validates a redacted fixture.
Policy declares critical runtime exclusions including outputs/, .devpilot/devpilot.db, .venv/ and node_modules/.
Policy requires dirty repo block semantics, secret-free evidence and dry-run-only behavior.
POST-H-017 is approved and synchronized across README, runbook, backlog, source registry, project state and TCR v1/v2.
block_criteria: BLOCK if the pack schema allows secrets_included=true, network_used=true, published=true or deployed=true.
BLOCK if the environment snapshot schema allows reading .env files or secret values.
BLOCK if the policy misses runtime artifact exclusions.
BLOCK if POST-H-017-A is not registered in TCR v1/v2 and docs governance.
risks: This is a schema/policy baseline only; pack generation, environment capture, archive manifest, verifier and final quality gate remain pending.
A future verifier must avoid false reproducibility claims when git state is dirty or runtime artifacts are included.
Secret redaction must remain deny-by-default in POST-H-017-B and later.
